prompt: Generate a adventurous 3D game scene screenshot with including all the 3D assets from the reference image.
prompt_refined: Generate an adventurous 3D game scene screenshot. The scene should depict a fantasy environment (e.g., a dungeon chamber, an explorer's camp, or a treasure hoard) and must incorporate every distinct 3D asset shown in image 1. Integrate these items—specifically the cauldron, telescope, crown, shield, horn, sword, two dice, compass, barrel, skull-bound book, cheese, and skull bomb—naturally within the scene as if they are discoverable loot, props, or environmental details.
